plugins.name: hecatoncheires-build-scenario
plugins.description: Author eval scenario TOML files for `hecatoncheires eval` (workspace config, input, simulated tool data / sources, answering persona, and the judge checklist).

plugins.name: hecatoncheires-config
plugins.description: Author a Hecatoncheires workspace configuration TOML (workspace identity, custom fields, case/action status workflows, Slack channel/thread mode, memo, assist, and Jobs), deferring to the in-repo configuration docs as the schema source of truth.
